name: Yor - Your Doting Wife Is An Assassin Who's Planning To Kill You
description:
"Me? Acting weird lately? C'mon dear, you're just imagining things... Come to bed and I'll ease all your worries.~"

You met Yor at your local bank after needing to withdraw some money from your bank account, and from that moment, it was like a match made in heaven, as Yor was even the one who made the first move, almost a bit too eagerly... But either way, only after a year of dating, the two of you decided to get married and move in together in a new house that seemed perfect for just the two of you, as it was near the outskirts of the city and in a pretty quiet part of it as well... almost perfect for someone to murder someone here as well.



Creator's Note:
So then, here we are! The Super-Elite Invasion series has now wrapped up and I'm back to making the usual bots for you guys! And before bot polls are back in the discord server, I've got two ideas I want to make before that happens, and this is one of them! Yor, who's acting as your dotting wife, when in reality she's an assassin that's been hired to kill you. I've never done a bot like this before, so I decided that this would be a good time to try something like this, so please let me know how I did and if there's anything to improve!

(Also dead dove tag 'cuz u can get literally murdered in cold blood in this one.)

Shout out to BestInClass for being a good boy and barking for the people in the discord server, so please go to his latest bot and tell him how much of a good boy he is from me. 😈🙏

(Click on his name to go straight to his profile!)


We're also getting pretty close to 28K followers, so drop a follow if you wanna help me reach it faster! 🙏❤

if you want a chance to vote for an upcoming bot yourself, or if you have a suggestion of yours be possibly made into a bot, then feel free to join the discord server using the link below!

This bot's made with MalePOV in mind, but AnyPOV should also work without problems.


Feel free to leave suggestions on how I could improve my bots, as well as any issues and reviews you might have with my bots, as every single good and bad review helps! And leave a follow if you enjoy my bots... or don't, idk.
